name_en: Exclusive photo M46099 Milky White M46112 Apricot M46002 Black Bagatelle Handbag This Bagatelle Handbag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte soft-grain calfskin, highlighting the large embossed pattern through color contrast. The detachable handle and detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allow you to explore trendy carrying styles. Dimensions 22.0 x 14.0 x 9.0 cm
